name: WD_DIALOG_BASIC
description: Full-featured basic dialog with title, icon (warning/info/check/loading/custom image), description text, and optional bottom animation. Dynamic layout based on content. Icon size 62px, supports various types and custom sources.
visualForm: Vertical centered layout: title text → icon (62x62px or custom) → multi-line description → optional bottom animation
descriptionKo: 타이틀, 아이콘(경고/정보/체크/로딩/커스텀), 설명 텍스트, 선택적 하단 애니메이션을 갖춘 풀 기능 기본 다이얼로그입니다. 62px 아이콘을 지원하며 콘텐츠에 따라 레이아웃이 동적으로 조정됩니다.
descriptionEn: Full-featured basic dialog with title, icon (warning/info/check/loading/custom image), description text, and optional bottom animation. Dynamic layout based on content. Icon size 62px, supports various types and custom sources.
